<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan (AR-001 to AR-011)
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This plan maps each Architectural Requirement (AR) to specific files to be created and their precise implementation logic. The plan is derived from specs in `./specs/`.
6: 
7: ## AR Mapping
8: 
9: | AR | Spec Directory | Description |
10: |----|----------------|-------------|
11: | AR-001 | session-routing | Session Routing & Reverse Proxy |
12: | AR-002 | ci-cd | CI/CD Pipeline |
13: | AR-003 | idle-cleanup | Idle Cleanup Controller |
14: | AR-004 | python-sdk | Python SDK |
15: | AR-005 | sandbox-orchestration | Sandbox Orchestration & CRDs |
16: | AR-006 | code-execution | PicoD Code Execution Daemon |
17: | AR-007 | deployment | Helm Deployment & Docker |
18: | AR-008 | integrations | Dify Plugin & PCAP Analyzer |
19: | AR-009 | session-store | Redis/Valkey Session Store |
20: | AR-010 | cli-toolkit | CLI Toolkit |
21: | AR-011 | - | *Reserved - not found in specs* |
22: 
23: ---
24: 
25: ## AR-001: Session Routing & Reverse Proxy
26: 
27: ### Package
28: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/router`
29: 
30: ### Files to Create
31: 
32: #### 1. `pkg/router/config.go`
33: ```go
34: type Config struct {
35:     Port                  string
36:     Debug                 bool
37:     EnableTLS             bool
38:     TLSCert               string
39:     TLSKey                string
40:     MaxConcurrentRequests int
41: }
42: ```
43: 
44: #### 2. `pkg/router/types.go`
45: - Define `SessionManager` interface
46: - Define `SandboxInfo`, `SandboxEntryPoint` types matching `pkg/common/types`
47: 
48: #### 3. `pkg/router/session_manager.go`
49: - Implement `manager` struct with `storeClient`, `workloadMgrAddr`, `httpClient`
50: - `NewSessionManager(storeClient store.Store) (SessionManager, error)`:
51:   - Read `WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL` env (required, else error)
52:   - Load K8s service account token from `/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token`
53:   - Configure HTTP client: 2min timeout, 100 MaxIdleConnsPerHost, HTTP/2 support
54: 
55: #### 4. `pkg/router/jwt.go`
56: - `JWTManager` struct with RSA 2048-bit key management
57: - `NewJWTManager()`: Generate RSA key pair
58: - `GenerateToken(claims)`: RS256 signing, 5min expiration
59: - `TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret()`: Create/load K8s secret `picod-router-identity` in namespace from `AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE` or `default`
60: 
61: #### 5. `pkg/router/proxy.go`
62: - Reverse proxy using `httputil.NewSingleHostReverseProxy`
63: - Custom Director: set path, host, forwarding headers (`X-Forwarded-Host`, `X-Forwarded-Proto`, `X-Forwarded-For`), optional JWT
64: - Error handler: map "connection refused" → 502, "timeout" → 504
65: - Response modifier: set `x-agentcube-session-id` header
66: 
67: #### 6. `pkg/router/middleware.go`
68: - Concurrency limiter: semaphore with configurable capacity (default 1000)
69: - Logging and recovery middleware
70: 
71: #### 7. `pkg/router/handlers.go`
72: - `handleHealthLive`: GET /health/live → 200 `{"status":"alive"}`
73: - `handleHealthReady`: GET /health/ready → 200 or 503 with session manager status
74: - `handleAgentInvoke`: Route for `/v1/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path`
75: - `handleCodeInterpreterInvoke`: Route for `/v1/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path`
76: 
77: #### 8. `pkg/router/server.go`
78: - `Server` struct with config, gin engine, HTTP server, session manager, store client, JWT manager
79: - Route registration with health endpoints and v1 routes
80: - Middleware stack: logging → recovery → concurrency limit
81: - `Start()`: serve with h2c and http2, ReadTimeout 30s, IdleTimeout 90s, graceful shutdown
82: 
83: #### 9. `cmd/router/main.go`
84: - CLI flags: `-port`, `-enable-tls`, `-tls-cert`, `-tls-key`, `-debug`, `-max-concurrent-requests`
85: - Initialize store, JWT manager, session manager, server
86: 
87: ### Logic Flow
88: 
89: 1. Request arrives with optional `x-agentcube-session-id` header
90: 2. If no header → POST to Workload Manager to create sandbox → get session ID
91: 3. If header present → load SandboxInfo from store
92: 4. Resolve upstream URL from SandboxInfo.EntryPoints (path prefix match or first entry)
93: 5. Generate JWT for sandbox kinds Sandbox/SandboxClaim
94: 6. Update last activity in store (before and after proxy)
95: 7. Proxy request with forwarding headers and JWT
96: 8. Return response with `x-agentcube-session-id` header
97: 
98: ---
99: 
100: ## AR-002: CI/CD Pipeline
101: 
102: ### Files to Create
103: 
104: #### 1. `.github/workflows/agentcube-ci.yml`
105: - Pull request triggers: build Docker image on PR to `main` or `release-*`
106: - Checkout, Docker Buildx setup, verify versions, run `make docker-build`
107: 
108: #### 2. `.github/workflows/lint.yml`
109: - Path filter: `**/*.go`, `go.mod`, `go.sum`, `.golangci.yml`
110: - Run with Go 1.24, execute `make lint` (golangci-lint)
111: 
112: #### 3. `.github/workflows/codegen.yml`
113: - Path filter: `pkg/apis/**`, `hack/**`, `.github/workflows/**`, `Makefile`
114: - Run `make gen-check` with Go 1.24.4
115: 
116: #### 4. `.github/workflows/coverage.yml`
117: - Race-enabled coverage tests: `go test -race -v -coverprofile=coverage.out -coverpkg=./pkg/... ./pkg/...`
118: - Upload coverage.out as artifact
119: 
120: #### 5. `.github/workflows/e2e.yml`
121: - Run `make e2e` on Kind (Go 1.23)
122: - Install Kind v0.30.0, capture logs on failure, always run `make e2e-clean`
123: 
124: #### 6. `.github/workflows/python-test.yml`
125: - Path filter: `sdk-python/**`
126: - Python 3.12, `pip install pytest`, `pip install -e .`, run `python -m pytest tests/ -v`
127: 
128: #### 7. `.github/workflows/python-lint.yml`
129: - Path filter: `cmd/cli/**`, `sdk-python/**`, `example/**`, `test/**/*.py`, `pyproject.toml`
130: - Run `python3 -m ruff check . --config pyproject.toml`
131: 
132: #### 8. `.github/workflows/spellcheck.yml`
133: - Run codespell with `--check-filenames`, backup/remove false-positive files
134: 
135: #### 9. `.github/workflows/copyright.yml`
136: - Run `make gen-copyright`, verify `git diff --exit-code`
137: 
138: #### 10. `.github/workflows/release.yml`
139: - Push to main: tag = `latest`
140: - Push tag: tag = `github.ref_name`
141: - Build/push multi-architecture images to ghcr.io
142: 
143: #### 11. `.github/workflows/approve-pr.yml`
144: - Approve workflow runs for repeat contributors or `ok-to-test` label
145: 
146: ---
147: 
148: ## AR-003: Idle Cleanup Controller
149: 
150: ### Package
151: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/cmd/agentd`
152: 
153: ### Files to Create
154: 
155: #### 1. `cmd/agentd/main.go`
156: - CLI flags parsing
157: - Manager setup: scheme with core + sandboxv1alpha1, disable metrics/health
158: - Signal handler for graceful shutdown
159: 
160: #### 2. `pkg/agentd/controller.go`
161: - Controller struct implementing `reconcile.Reconciler`
162: - `Reconcile(ctx, req)`:
163:   - Get Sandbox from API reader
164:   - If NotFound → return empty result
165:   - Read annotation `last-activity-time` (key: `workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey`)
166:   - If missing → no action, return
167:   - Parse RFC3339 timestamp
168:     - If parse error → RequeueAfter 30s with error
169:   - Compute `expirationTime = lastActivity.Add(15 minutes)`
170:   - If `time.Now().After(expirationTime)` → delete Sandbox
171:     - If NotFound → treat as success
172:     - Other errors → return to trigger retry
173:   - If not expired → RequeueAfter `time.Until(expirationTime)`
174: 
175: #### 3. `pkg/agentd/types.go`
176: - Constants: `SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute`
177: - Constants: `LastActivityAnnotationKey`
178: 
179: ---
180: 
181: ## AR-004: Python SDK
182: 
183: ### Package
184: `agentcube` (sdk-python/)
185: 
186: ### Files to Create
187: 
188: #### 1. `sdk-python/agentcube/__init__.py`
189: - Export `CodeInterpreterClient`, `AgentRuntimeClient` in `__all__`
190: 
191: #### 2. `sdk-python/agentcube/exceptions.py`
192: - `AgentCubeError` (base)
193: - `CommandExecutionError` (extends AgentCubeError): exit_code, stderr, command
194: - `SessionError`, `DataPlaneError` (defined but not raised in core)
195: 
196: #### 3. `sdk-python/agentcube/client.py`
197: - `ControlPlaneClient`:
198:   - `__init__(base_url, auth_token)`: resolve from env if not provided
199:   - `create_session(name, namespace, metadata=None, ttl=3600)` → sessionId
200:   - `delete_session(session_id)`: return True on 404
201:   - `read_token_from_file()`: read K8s service account token
202: 
203: #### 4. `sdk-python/agentcube/data_plane.py`
204: - `CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient`:
205:   - `__init__(base_url, session_id, router_url)`: require router_url or ROUTER_URL env
206:   - `execute_command(command, timeout=None)`: POST to `api/execute`, raise CommandExecutionError on non-zero exit
207:   - `run_code(code, language='python')`: write timestamped .py file, execute via execute_command
208:   - `write_file(path, content, mode='0644')`: POST api/files with base64 content
209:   - `upload_file(path, file)`: multipart POST
210:   - `download_file(path)`: GET api/files/<path>
211:   - `list_files(path)`: GET api/files?path=...
212:   - `stop()`: close session
213: 
214: - `AgentRuntimeClient`:
215:   - `SESSION_HEADER = "x-agentcube-session-id"`
216:   - `__init__(...)`: bootstrap session_id via GET if not provided
217:   - `invoke(payload, timeout=None)`: POST JSON with session header
218: 
219: #### 5. `sdk-python/agentcube/client_composition.py`
220: - `CodeInterpreterClient`:
221:   - Context manager: `__enter__`, `__exit__` → stop(), delete session if created
222:   - Init data plane, handle failures (log warning, delete session, re-raise)
223: 
224: #### 6. `sdk-python/agentcube/utils.py`
225: - Timeout handling: default 120s read, 5s connect
226: - Request helpers with connection pooling (HTTPAdapter)
227: 
228: ---
229: 
230: ## AR-005: Sandbox Orchestration
231: 
232: ### Package
233: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube`
234: 
235: ### Files to Create
236: 
237: #### 1. `pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/groupversion_info.go`
238: ```go
239: var GroupVersion = schema.GroupVersion{Group: "runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh", Version: "v1alpha1"}
240: var SchemeBuilder = &scheme.Builder{GroupVersion: GroupVersion}
241: var AddToScheme = SchemeBuilder.AddToScheme
242: ```
243: 
244: #### 2. `pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/register.go`
245: - Register: `AgentRuntimeKind`, `CodeInterpreterKind`, `AgentRuntimeListKind`, `CodeInterpreterListKind`
246: 
247: #### 3. `pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/agent_type.go`
248: - `AgentRuntime` CRD with spec: Ports, Template (SandboxTemplate), SessionTimeout, MaxSessionDuration
249: - `AgentRuntimeStatus` with Conditions
250: - `SandboxTemplate` embedding PodSpec
251: - Kubebuilder markers: subresource:status, printcolumn Age, scope Namespaced
252: 
253: #### 4. `pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/codeinterpreter_types.go`
254: - `CodeInterpreter` CRD with spec: Ports, Template, SessionTimeout, MaxSessionDuration, WarmPoolSize, AuthMode
255: - `CodeInterpreterStatus` with Conditions and Ready
256: - `CodeInterpreterSandboxTemplate`: RuntimeClassName, Image, ImagePullSecrets, Environment, Resources
257: - `TargetPort`: PathPrefix, Name, Port, Protocol
258: - `AuthModeType`: "picod" or "none"
259: - `ProtocolType`: "HTTP" or "HTTPS"
260: 
261: #### 5. `pkg/common/types/types.go`
262: - Constants: `AgentRuntimeKind`, `CodeInterpreterKind`, `SandboxKind`, `SandboxClaimsKind`
263: - `SandboxInfo`, `SandboxEntryPoint`, `CreateSandboxRequest`, `CreateSandboxResponse`
264: - `CreateSandboxRequest.Validate()`
265: 
266: #### 6. `pkg/api/errors.go`
267: - `ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound`, `ErrCodeInterpreterNotFound`, `ErrTemplateMissing`, `ErrPublicKeyMissing`
268: - `NewSessionNotFoundError`, `NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError`, `NewUpstreamUnavailableError`, `NewInternalError`
269: 
270: #### 7. `pkg/workloadmanager/config.go`
271: - `Config`: Port, RuntimeClassName, EnableTLS, TLSCert, TLSKey, EnableAuth
272: 
273: #### 8. `pkg/workloadmanager/server.go`
274: - `Server` struct: config, gin engine, k8s client, sandbox controller, token cache, informers, store
275: - Routes: GET /health, POST/DELETE /v1/agent-runtime, POST/DELETE /v1/code-interpreter
276: 
277: #### 9. `pkg/workloadmanager/handlers.go`
278: - `handleHealth`: 200 `{"status":"healthy"}`
279: - `handleAgentRuntimeCreate`: Validate → create sandbox → return CreateSandboxResponse
280: - `handleCodeInterpreterCreate`: Similar with CodeInterpreter logic
281: - `handleDeleteSandbox`: Load session → delete Sandbox/SandboxClaim → cleanup store
282: - Error responses: 400, 401, 404, 500 with appropriate JSON
283: 
284: #### 10. `pkg/workloadmanager/k8s_client.go`
285: - `K8sClient`: clientset, dynamic client, scheme, client cache, informers
286: - REST config: QPS=50, Burst=100
287: 
288: #### 11. `pkg/workloadmanager/informers.go`
289: - GVR definitions: AgentRuntime, CodeInterpreter, Sandbox, SandboxClaim
290: - Shared informer factory setup
291: 
292: #### 12. `pkg/workloadmanager/auth.go`
293: - Token cache: LRU with 1000 capacity, 5min TTL
294: - `validateServiceAccountToken`: TokenReview API
295: - Auth middleware: extract Bearer token, validate, cache, store in context
296: - Context keys: userToken, serviceAccount, serviceAccountName, namespace
297: 
298: #### 13. `pkg/workloadmanager/sandbox_controller.go`
299: - `SandboxReconciler`: implement controller-runtime Reconciler
300: - Watch sandbox status, notify waiters when running
301: 
302: #### 14. `pkg/workloadmanager/sandbox_builder.go`
303: - `buildSandboxObject`: Build Sandbox/SandboxClaim from AgentRuntime/CodeInterpreter
304: - Labels, annotations, lifecycle, replicas
305: - Identity secret handling
306: 
307: #### 15. `pkg/workloadmanager/garbage_collector.go`
308: - Tick every 15 seconds
309: - List inactive (15min cutoff, batch 16), expired (now, batch 16)
310: - Delete workloads, remove store entries
311: 
312: #### 16. `pkg/workloadmanager/watcher.go`
313: - One-shot watcher registration before sandbox create
314: - Wait for running status (2min timeout)
315: 
316: #### 17. `pkg/workloadmanager/pod_resolver.go`
317: - Resolve pod IP: prefer annotation, fallback to label selector
318: - Require PodRunning and PodIP
319: 
320: #### 18. `cmd/workload-manager/main.go`
321: - CLI flags: `-port`, `-runtime-class-name`, `-enable-tls`, `-tls-cert`, `-tls-key`, `-enable-auth`
322: - Initialize manager, run server with graceful shutdown
323:

326: ## AR-006: Code Execution (PicoD)
327: 
328: ### Package
329: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/cmd/picod`
330: 
331: ### Files to Create
332: 
333: #### 1. `cmd/picod/main.go`
334: - CLI flags: `-port` (default 8080), `-workspace` (default CWD)
335: - Initialize server with Config
336: 
337: #### 2. `pkg/picod/config.go`
338: ```go
339: type Config struct {
340:     Port      string
341:     Workspace string
342: }
343: ```
344: 
345: #### 3. `pkg/picod/server.go`
346: - `Server` struct: config, gin engine, JWT manager, workspace root
347: - Routes: health without auth, /api/* with JWT middleware
348: - Server: ReadHeaderTimeout 10s, ReleaseMode
349: 
350: #### 4. `pkg/picod/jwt.go`
351: - `AuthManager`: validate RS256 JWT with public key
352: - `AuthMiddleware`: require Bearer token, parse JWT, reject non-RSA
353: - `MaxBodySize` wrapper
354: 
355: #### 5. `pkg/picod/handlers.go`
356: - `handleHealth`: 200 with status, service, version, uptime
357: 
358: - `handleExecute` (POST /api/execute):
359:   - Parse ExecuteRequest: command []string, timeout string, working_dir, env
360:   - Validate: non-empty command
361:   - Parse timeout (default 60s, support "30s", "500ms")
362:     - Invalid → 400 with error
363:   - exec.CommandContext with timeout
364:     - Timeout → exit_code 124, stderr includes timeout message
365:   - Return ExecuteResponse: stdout, stderr, exit_code, duration, start_time, end_time
366: 
367: - `handleFileUpload` (POST /api/files):
368:   - Multipart: path, file, mode
369:     - Create parent dirs 0755, write file, apply mode (default 0644)
370:   - JSON: path, content (base64), mode
371:     - Decode base64, create dirs, write file
372: 
373: - `handleListFiles` (GET /api/files?path=...):
374:   - Require path query param
375:   - ReadDir at sanitized path
376:   - Return ListFilesResponse: files [{name, size, modified, mode, is_dir}]
377: 
378: - `handleDownloadFile` (GET /api/files/*path):
379:   - Sanitize path, verify it's a file
380:   - Set download headers: Content-Description, Transfer-Encoding, Content-Disposition, Content-Type
381:   - Stream file
382: 
383: #### 6. `pkg/picod/path.go`
384: - `sanitizePath(workspaceRoot, requestPath)`: prevent directory traversal
385: - `parseFileMode(modeStr)`: parse octal, cap at 0777, default 0644
386: 
387: #### 7. `pkg/picod/types.go`
388: - Request/response types: ExecuteRequest, ExecuteResponse, UploadFileRequest, FileInfo, ListFilesResponse, FileEntry
389: 
390: ---
391: 
392: ## AR-007: Deployment
393: 
394: ### Files to Create
395: 
396: #### 1. `manifests/charts/base/Chart.yaml`
397: - name: agentcube
398: - version: 0.1.0
399: 
400: #### 2. `manifests/charts/base/values.yaml`
401: - redis.addr, redis.password (required)
402: - workloadmanager: replicas, image, service.port, resources, extraEnv
403: - router: replicas, image, service, resources, rbac.create, serviceAccountName
404: - volcano.scheduler.enabled
405: 
406: #### 3. `manifests/charts/base/templates/_helpers.tpl`
407: - Template functions for fullname, labels
408: 
409: #### 4. `manifests/charts/base/templates/workloadmanager-deployment.yaml`
410: - Deployment + Service
411: - Env: REDIS_ADDR, REDIS_PASSWORD from values
412: - Liveness/Readiness: HTTP GET /health
413: 
414: #### 5. `manifests/charts/base/templates/router-deployment.yaml`
415: - Deployment + Service (ClusterIP)
416: - Env: WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL = http://workloadmanager.{namespace}.svc.cluster.local:{port}
417: - Args: --port, --debug
418: 
419: #### 6. `manifests/charts/base/templates/rbac.yaml`
420: - ServiceAccount workloadmanager
421: - ClusterRole workloadmanager (rules for agent-sandbox, CRDs, pods, secrets)
422: - ClusterRoleBinding workloadmanager
423: - Optional: Router Role/RoleBinding when router.rbac.create=true
424: 
425: #### 7. `manifests/charts/base/templates/volcano-scheduler.yaml`
426: - Optional: ServiceAccount, ConfigMap, ClusterRole, ClusterRoleBinding, Service, Deployment
427: 
428: #### 8. `manifests/charts/base/crds/`
429: - agentruntimes-crd.yaml: runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1
430: - codeinterpreters-crd.yaml: same group/version, scope Namespaced
431: 
432: #### 9. `docker/Dockerfile`
433: - Multi-stage: Go build (CGO_ENABLED=0), Alpine 3.19
434: - Non-root user (apiserver UID 1000), port 8080
435: 
436: #### 10. `docker/Dockerfile.router`
437: - Similar to workload manager, router UID 1000
438: 
439: #### 11. `docker/Dockerfile.picod`
440: - Multi-stage: Go build, Alpine, non-root
441: 
442: #### 12. `Makefile`
443: - Targets: build, test, docker-build, docker-push, docker-buildx-push, generate, gen-crd, gen-client, gen-all, gen-check, e2e, e2e-clean
444: 
445: ---
446: 
447: ## AR-008: Integrations
448: 
449: ### Files to Create
450: 
451: #### 1. `integrations/dify-plugin/manifest.yaml`
452: - Plugin metadata, tool provider registration, resource permissions
453: - meta.version, arch, runner (language: python, version, entrypoint)
454: 
455: #### 2. `integrations/dify-plugin/provider/agentcube.yaml`
456: - Provider identity, tools list (agentcube-code-interpreter.yaml)
457: - extra.python.source: provider/agentcube.py
458: 
459: #### 3. `integrations/dify-plugin/tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.yaml`
460: - Parameters: router_url, workload_manager_url (required), language (select), code, command, session_id, session_reuse, code_interpreter_id
461: 
462: #### 4. `integrations/dify-plugin/provider/agentcube.py`
463: - `AgentcubeCodeInterpreterProvider` class
464: - `_validate_credentials()`: raise ToolProviderCredentialValidationError if invalid
465: 
466: #### 5. `integrations/dify-plugin/tools/agentcube_code_interpreter.py`
467: - `AgentcubeCodeInterpreterTool` extends `Tool`
468: - `_invoke(...)`: call execute, return create_json_message(result)
469: 
470: #### 6. `integrations/dify-plugin/main.py`
471: - Plugin entry: `Plugin(DifyPluginEnv(MAX_REQUEST_TIMEOUT=120)).run()`
472: 
473: #### 7. `integrations/dify-plugin/requirements.txt`
474: - dify-plugin>=0.4.2,<0.5.0
475: - agentcube-sdk>=0.0.10
476: 
477: #### 8. `example/pcap-analyzer/pcap_analyzer.py`
478: - FastAPI app
479: - Startup: validate OPENAI_API_KEY
480: - POST /analyze: accept uploaded PCAP or pcap_path
481: - Return AnalyzeResponse: script, results, report
482: 
483: #### 9. `example/pcap-analyzer/config.py`
484: - Defaults: OPENAI_API_BASE=https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1
485: - OPENAI_MODEL=QwQ-32B, CODEINTERPRETER_NAME=my-interpreter, SANDBOX_NAMESPACE=default, SANDBOX_WARMUP_SEC=5
486: 
487: #### 10. `example/pcap-analyzer/sandbox_runner.py`
488: - `SandboxRunner`: wrap CodeInterpreterClient
489: - run(command): execute command
490: - upload_file, upload_bytes: stage files to sandbox
491: 
492: #### 11. `example/pcap-analyzer/Dockerfile`
493: - Install deps with uv, vendor agentcube SDK, PYTHONPATH=/app
494: - Entrypoint: uv run pcap_analyzer.py
495: 
496: #### 12. `example/pcap-analyzer/deployment.yaml`
497: - Deployment: pcap-analyzer:latest, resources (200m-1cpu, 100Mi-1Gi)
498: - Env: from Secret for OPENAI_API_KEY, plain env for others
499: 
500: ---
501: 
502: ## AR-009: Session Store
503: 
504: ### Package
505: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store`
506: 
507: ### Files to Create
508: 
509: #### 1. `pkg/store/store.go`
510: - `Store` interface:
511:   - Ping(ctx) error
512:   - GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
513:   - StoreSandbox(ctx, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error
514:   - UpdateSandbox(ctx, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error
515:   - DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx, sessionID) error
516:   - ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
517:   - ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
518:   - UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
519:   - Close() error
520: 
521: #### 2. `pkg/store/errors.go`
522: - `ErrNotFound`: message "store: not found"
523: 
524: #### 3. `pkg/store/redis/redis.go`
525: - Redis implementation using go-redis/v9
526: - Keys: session:{sessionID}, session:expiry (ZSET), session:last_activity (ZSET)
527: - Pipeline for atomic operations
528: - StoreSandbox: SETNX on session key, ZADD expiry, ZADD last_activity
529: - UpdateSandbox: SET with XX
530: - DeleteSandboxBySessionID: DEL session key, ZREM from both ZSETs
531: 
532: #### 4. `pkg/store/valkey/valkey.go`
533: - Valkey implementation using valkey-go
534: - Similar interface to Redis
535: - Handle Valkey-specific nil responses
536: 
537: #### 5. `pkg/store/factory.go`
538: - `Storage() Store`: singleton with sync.Once
539: - Read STORE_TYPE (default "redis")
540: - Validate: redis or valkey
541: - Read Redis/Valkey env vars (ADDR, PASSWORD, PASSWORD_REQUIRED)
542: - Failed init → klog.Fatal
543: 
544: ---
545: 
546: ## AR-010: CLI Toolkit
547: 
548: ### Package
549: `agentcube` (cmd/cli/)
550: 
551: ### Files to Create
552: 
553: #### 1. `cmd/cli/agentcube/__init__.py`
554: - __version__ = "0.1.0"
555: 
556: #### 2. `cmd/cli/agentcube/cli.py`
557: - Typer app named "agentcube"
558: - Global options: --version, --verbose/-v
559: 
560: #### 3. `cmd/cli/agentcube/commands/pack.py`
561: - Options: workspace (-f), agent_name, language, entrypoint, port, build_mode, description, output, verbose
562: - Call `PackRuntime.pack()`, progress spinner
563: - Error handling: print error in red, traceback if verbose
564: 
565: #### 4. `cmd/cli/agentcube/commands/build.py`
566: - Options: workspace, proxy, cloud_provider, output, verbose
567: - Local Docker build via `BuildRuntime.build()`
568: - Version increment on build
569: 
570: #### 5. `cmd/cli/agentcube/commands/publish.py`
571: - Options: workspace, version, image_url, image_username, image_password, description, region, cloud_provider, provider (default agentcube), node_port, replicas, namespace, verbose
572: - AgentCube provider: create AgentRuntime CR
573: - K8s provider: create Deployment + NodePort Service, wait for ready
574: 
575: #### 6. `cmd/cli/agentcube/commands/invoke.py`
576: - Options: workspace, payload (default "{}"), header (repeatable), provider, verbose
577: - Parse payload as JSON
578: - Parse headers as key:value
579: - AgentRuntime: rewrite URL to invocation endpoint
580: - Add X-Agentcube-Session-Id header
581: 
582: #### 7. `cmd/cli/agentcube/commands/status.py`
583: - Options: workspace, provider, verbose
584: - Rich Table display
585: - Exit 1 if not_published or error
586: 
587: #### 8. `cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/pack_runtime.py`
588: - `PackRuntime.pack(workspace, ...)`: validate workspace, merge metadata, generate Dockerfile, save agent_metadata.yaml
589: 
590: #### 9. `cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/build_runtime.py`
591: - `BuildRuntime.build(workspace, ...)`: Docker SDK build, version bump, push
592: 
593: #### 10. `cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/publish_runtime.py`
594: - `AgentCubeProvider.deploy_agent(...)`: create AgentRuntime CR
595: - `KubernetesProvider.deploy_agent(...)`: create Deployment/Service
596: - `wait_for_deployment_ready(...)`: timeout 120s
597: 
598: #### 11. `cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/invoke_runtime.py`
599: - `InvokeRuntime.invoke(...)`: HTTP POST, handle response
600: 
601: #### 12. `cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/status_runtime.py`
602: - `StatusRuntime.get_status(...)`: query Kubernetes or AgentCube
603: 
604: #### 13. `cmd/cli/agentcube/services/docker_service.py`
605: - `DockerService.build_image(...)`: docker.from_env(), tag, buildargs
606: - `DockerService.push_image(...)`: login, retag, stream push
607: - `DockerService.remove_image(...)`: remove image, return bool
608: 
609: #### 14. `cmd/cli/agentcube/services/kubernetes_service.py`
610: - Kubernetes client for standard K8s provider
611: - Deployment/Service CRUD
612: 
613: #### 15. `cmd/cli/agentcube/services/metadata_service.py`
614: - `MetadataService.save_metadata(workspace, metadata)`: write agent_metadata.yaml
615: - `MetadataService.load_metadata(workspace)`: load YAML, fallback to agent.yaml, metadata.yaml
616: - Pydantic validation
617: 
618: #### 16. `cmd/cli/agentcube/models/metadata.py`
619: - `AgentMetadata` Pydantic model with validators for language, build_mode, port range
620: 
621: #### 17. `cmd/cli/agentcube/utils/errors.py`
622: - `_handle_error(e, command_name, verbose)`: print error, traceback if verbose, typer.Exit(1)
623: 
624: ---
625: 
626: ## AR-011: Reserved
627: 
628: No specification found for AR-011 in the provided specs directory. This AR may be a placeholder or may have been assigned to a spec that was not included in this review.
629: 
630: ---
631: 
632: ## Summary
633: 
634: | AR | Go Packages | Python Packages | Config/Other Files |
635: |----|-------------|-----------------|-------------------|
636: | AR-001 | pkg/router, cmd/router | - | - |
637: | AR-002 | - | - | .github/workflows/* (10+ files) |
638: | AR-003 | pkg/agentd, cmd/agentd | - | - |
639: | AR-004 | - | sdk-python/agentcube (6 modules) | - |
640: | AR-005 | pkg/apis, pkg/common/types, pkg/api, pkg/workloadmanager, cmd/workload-manager | - | - |
641: | AR-006 | pkg/picod, cmd/picod | - | - |
642: | AR-007 | - | - | manifests/charts/base/*, docker/*, Makefile |
643: | AR-008 | - | integrations/dify-plugin, example/pcap-analyzer | - |
644: | AR-009 | pkg/store, pkg/store/redis, pkg/store/valkey | - | - |
645: | AR-010 | - | cmd/cli/agentcube (17 modules) | - |
646: | AR-011 | Reserved | - | - |
647: 
648: ## Implementation Dependencies
649: 
650: 1. **AR-009 (Store)** → Required by AR-001, AR-003, AR-005
651: 2. **AR-005 (Orchestration)** → Required by AR-001, AR-006
652: 3. **AR-004 (Python SDK)** → Built on AR-001, AR-005 APIs
653: 4. **AR-010 (CLI)** → Uses AR-004 SDK, integrates with AR-005
654: 5. **AR-007 (Deployment)** → Deploys AR-001, AR-003, AR-005 components
655: 6. **AR-002 (CI/CD)** → Tests all components
656: 
657: ## Recommended Implementation Order
658: 
659: 1. AR-009 (Session Store) - Foundation
660: 2. AR-005 (Sandbox Orchestration) - CRDs and Workload Manager
661: 3. AR-001 (Session Routing) - Router component
662: 4. AR-006 (PicoD) - Code execution daemon
663: 5. AR-003 (Idle Cleanup) - Agentd controller
664: 6. AR-004 (Python SDK) - Client library
665: 7. AR-010 (CLI) - CLI tool
666: 8. AR-007 (Deployment) - Helm and Docker
667: 9. AR-008 (Integrations) - Dify and PCAP
668: 10. AR-002 (CI/CD) - Pipeline setup

(End of file - total 668 lines)
</content>

# AgentCube Implementation Plan (AR-001 to AR-011)

## Overview

This plan maps each Architectural Requirement (AR) to specific files to be created and their precise implementation logic. The plan is derived from specs in `./specs/`.

## AR Mapping

| AR | Spec Directory | Description |
|----|----------------|-------------|
| AR-001 | session-routing | Session Routing & Reverse Proxy |
| AR-002 | ci-cd | CI/CD Pipeline |
| AR-003 | idle-cleanup | Idle Cleanup Controller |
| AR-004 | python-sdk | Python SDK |
| AR-005 | sandbox-orchestration | Sandbox Orchestration & CRDs |
| AR-006 | code-execution | PicoD Code Execution Daemon |
| AR-007 | deployment | Helm Deployment & Docker |
| AR-008 | integrations | Dify Plugin & PCAP Analyzer |
| AR-009 | session-store | Redis/Valkey Session Store |
| AR-010 | cli-toolkit | CLI Toolkit |

input.content:
package store

import (
	"context"
	"time"

	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
)

type Store interface {
	Ping(ctx context.Context) error
	GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error)
	StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error
	UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error
	DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error
	ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
	ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error)
	UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error
	Close() error
}
